name: C-3 manifest envelope includes the cost_telemetry block per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out m.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));const c=j.cost_telemetry;process.exit(c&&typeof c.tokens_in==="number"&&typeof c.tokens_out==="number"&&typeof c.monetary_estimate_usd==="number"?0:1)' && echo block 1>&2
